content:
Today’s 9to5Toys Lunch Break is headlined by Amazon delivering MacBook Neo as early as tomorrow from $590 and the ongoing AirPods Pro 3 deal, but we also have some serious clearance deals live on M3 iPad Air – 1TB M3 iPad Air $300 off and the 11-inch 512GB at $250 off. We also have Apple’s 24GB/1TB M5 MacBook Pro at best price of the year ($250 off) and the most affordable new M5 MacBook Air model back to one of the best prices ever (nearly $150 off). Head below for a closer look.

Amazon delivering new MacBook Neo as early as tomorrow from $590, still up to 3 weeks from Apple

  • MacBook Neo Citrus 256GB $590 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Citrus 512GB $690 – $10 off delivery delayed until May 4
  • MacBook Neo Silver 256GB $590 – $10 off delivery in two days
  • MacBook Neo Silver 512GB $690 – $10 off delivery delayed until May 5
  • MacBook Neo Indigo 256GB $590 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Indigo 512GB $690 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Blush 256GB $590 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Blush 512GB $690 – $10 off delivery delayed until May 4

AirPods Pro 3 just dropped back down to one of the best prices in months at Amazon

Heads up: Best Amazon price ever lands on 1TB M3 iPad Air this morning at $300 off list, more

We have tracked some notable clearance deals on the m3 iPad Air since the release of the new M4 lineup, but nothing quite was good as this 13-inch 1TB model at major $300 off the original list price. This deal might not stick around for long folks.

Amazon is now offering the 13-inch 1TB M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell model down at $1,149 shipped. This is an original $1,449 tablet now at $300 off the list price to deliver the best deal we have ever tracked at Amazon.

For the record, the most comparable 1TB M4 iPad Air is currently carrying its full $1,449 list price at Amazon where it has never sold for less than $1,349.

We have seen a number of chances to score M3 models at $150, $200, and even $250 off since the release of the M4 models, but nothing quite as low as we have here on this configuration. It is also worth mentioning that while something like the older iPad Pro models can sometimes see even deeper deals than this, the iPad Air lineup is almost never discounted this much during its lifecycle, or even this sooner after.

As you can see below, there are also some notable 11-inch clearance deals live right now at Amazon. Take note of that 512GB model in the middle there – I just dropped another $50 to deliver the lowest price we have ever tracked on Amazon:

  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 256GB $649 (Reg. $849)
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 512GB $799 (Reg. $1,049) – new Amazon all-time low
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 1TB $999 (Reg. $1,249)

And here’s a look at how deal pricing lands on the latest M4 iPad Air lineup for reference:

Apple’s mid-range 11-inch 512GB M3 iPad Air cell hits new Amazon all-time low clearance price at $250 off

Apple’s 24GB/1TB M5 MacBook Pro just hit the best price of the year at nearly $250 off the orig. price

We are checking back in with the recently upgraded M5 MacBook Pro lineup today as the 24GB model has now dropped to its best price of the year at Amazon. We are also still tracking some all-time low pricing on the 2026 M5 Pro models down below, but we wanted to highlight this more affordable option this morning at the particularly notable price.

Amazon is now offering the 14-inch M5 MacBook Pro with 24GB of RAM and the 1TB storage capacity at $1,751.50 shipped.

This configuration launched at $1,999 in late 2025 and is now nearly $250 less than that. However, Apple did upgrade the storage tiers on the M5 lineup last month, effectively dropping the price on this model to $1,899. But you are, either way, landing a notable $148 in savings here to deliver the best price of the year.

Today’s deal comes within $1.50 of the lowest price we have ever tracked at Amazon on this configuration – a deal we have not seen return since it went live for Black Friday last year.

As mentioned above, there are also still some notable deals on the 2026 M5 Pro models you’ll find listed below. While the 24GB/2TB has now jumped up $50 from our previous mention, the 24GB/1TB has now dropped a touch lower to deliver a new Amazon all-time low:

  • 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/1TB $1,996 (Reg. $2,199) – new Amazon all-time low
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/2TB $2,549 (Reg. $2,699)
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 48GB/1TB $2,899 (Reg. $3,099)
  • 14-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,359 (Reg. $3,599)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,699 (Reg. $3,899)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 48GB/2TB $4,199 (Reg. $4,399)

Most affordable new M5 MacBook Air model back to one of the best prices ever (Nearly $150 off)

  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/512GB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,549 (Reg. $1,699)

Most affordable new 2026 M5 Pro MacBook Pro you can buy just hit a new Amazon low at over $200 off

Apple’s most affordable USB-C Magic Keyboard is still sitting at the Amazon all-time low

Land Apple Pencil Pro at over 50% off the list price, now under $59 (Amazon Like New)

Today’s accessories and charging deals:

  • This 8-in-1 USB-C docking station packs 4K 60Hz HDMI and even an M.2 SSD enclosure for $41.50 (Reg. $65)
  • Save desk space and track using your thumb with Logitech’s Ergo M575S wireless mouse down at just $29
  • Woot’s updated Logitech sale is live at up to 70% off: Mac and gaming accessories from just $12
  • This wildly thin 5K MagSafe power bank is among the thinnest in my EDC, and you can snag it for just $14 today
  • Feature-packed 65W wall charger with Type-C cable and travel adapters hits $20
  • Just $22 today gets you this 67W Baseus charger with retractable USB-C cable to fast charge your iPhone 17 (47% off)
  • Score Apple’s elusive black USB-C cables from $7 each while you still can

Score Mom a new Apple Watch Series 11 at up to $130 off (All colors options on sale)

One of the best deals we have tracked to date on Apple Watch Series 11 is live right now at Amazon – the 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell model at $130 off. We are now tracking both the Jet Black model and the Rose Gold color, either of which might make for a super sweet Mother’s Day gift this year.

Admittedly, a brand new Series 11 is quite a generous Mother’s Day gift, but if you are looking to treat mom this year, a new Apple Watch might be perfect.

Not only are we tracking some of the best deals ever on the GPS + Cell models to keep mom always connected, but you’ll also find just about all color options, from the Rose Gold with blush band through to the silver and Jet Black that can work with just about any outfit, marked down by at least $100 with deals starting from $299 shipped right now:

  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 $299 (Reg. $399)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 $329 (Reg. $429)
  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $499)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $529)

And if mom already has the Apple Watch she needs, a new band or two for a summer refresh can make for a notable and even more affordable gift option:

Best Buy’s Featured Top Deals of the Week now live: LG and Samsung OLED TVs from $600, appliance bundles $2,600 off, more
